plugins.prepareCmd: V='${nextRelease.version}'; for f in plugins/multi-agent-review/.claude-plugin/plugin.json plugins/multi-agent-review/.codex-plugin/plugin.json plugins/multi-agent-review/.cursor-plugin/plugin.json package.json; do jq --arg v "$V" '.version = $v' "$f" > .tmp.json && mv .tmp.json "$f"; done
